Index.title: VIGILANTE
Index.subtitle: Resume Tailor
Index.hero_desc: Upload your resume and a job description. VIGILANTE's AI engine injects missing keywords, restructures content, and compiles an ATS-optimized PDF — in seconds.
Index.footer: VIGILANTE Resume Tailor — Engineered for career operatives.

Auth.login_subtitle: Authenticate to access the Tailoring Engine
Auth.verification_desc: Check your email inbox and click the confirmation link to activate your account.

Dashboard.title: Tailor Your Resume
Dashboard.desc: Upload your current resume and the target job description. The AI engine will inject critical missing skills.

HowTo.title: Three steps to a stronger resume
HowTo.subtitle: Fast, practical, and designed for ATS—without inventing experience.

step1.title: Upload your resume
step1.desc: PDF, DOCX, or TXT. We extract text safely and prepare it for tailoring.

step2.title: Paste the job description
step2.desc: We identify missing keywords and align your content to match the role.

step3.title: Generate and download
step3.desc: Review ATS scores, keywords, and download a clean PDF template.
